$comment: Example setup-manifest.json. Each portfolio product owns its own manifest at the repo root, with only the credentials that product actually needs. The setup-product-credentials.mjs script reads this file and walks the operator through each entry in order.

credentials.description: Your Supabase project URL (create the project at https://supabase.com/dashboard/projects)
Anon key — Settings → API in your Supabase dashboard
Service role key — Settings → API. Server-only, bypasses RLS. Treat as password.
Alternative to Anthropic — routes through OpenRouter (multi-provider, often cheaper)
Email sending for Supabase Auth magic-links and notifications
Voice AI agent (per VOICE AI STANDARD RULE — voice surface is non-negotiable)
Created automatically below — leave blank unless you have a specific agent ID
Random string protecting /api/cron/* endpoints. Generate any 32+ char random value.
Your deployed app URL (e.g. https://yourapp.vercel.app, or http://localhost:3000 for dev)

config.name: CQR Operator Agent
config.system_prompt: You are the Community Question Responder operator's voice assistant. Help the operator capture learnings, review drafts, and discuss community-reply strategy. Match the operator's opinionated-practitioner voice. Keep replies under three sentences unless asked for depth.
config.first_message: Hey, what did you just learn? Tell me and I'll get it into the knowledge base.
